attention3.ptxt: In case that MIL lights while engine is running, the malfunction(s) is detected by ECM and it stores the trouble information (DTC, freeze flame data, etc.) in its memory.

s1.ptxt: Prepare SUZUKI scan tool or CAN communication OBD generic scan tool.
With ignition “OFF”, connect scan tool to DLC (1).
Set ignition “ON” and confirm that MIL lights up.
Read DTC, pending DTC and freeze frame data according to instructions displayed on scan tool and print them or write them down. Refer to scan tool operator's manual for further details.
If communication between scan tool and ECM is impossible, go to Troubleshooting for Communication Bus Off .
After completing the check, set ignition “OFF” and disconnect scan tool from DLC.
